title: e2e_payment: doc how to produce ALICE_PRELOADED_DB
description: The module-level doc in cli/tests/e2e_payment.rs lists ALICE_PRELOADED_DB as a required env var and says 'SQLite wallet.db with scanned notes and witnesses', but does not tell a developer how to create such a file. A developer encountering this test for the first time has no guidance. The doc should add a 'Preparation' section explaining: (1) use zcash-devtool or zcash-client-backend to scan the chain with ALICE_MNEMONIC on testnet, (2) the db must contain at least one spendable note worth >= 0.001 TAZ plus Merkle witnesses, (3) a suggested command or reference to a script.
